title: Lumibricks Western Blacksmith Shop Building Kit 2042pcs | Light-Up Model with LED & Forge Fire Effect | Collectable Wild West Architecture Set for Adults | Gift & Display Piece
features: 【Light-Up LED System｜Immersive Display】 Includes street lamps, lanterns, candles and a unique forge fire breathing light effect. Brings the workshop to life at night and makes it a striking display piece.

【Authentic Western Style｜Ideal for Collectors & Gifts】 Crumbling stone walls, patched timber panels and a rustic metal roof recreate the rugged Wild West. A unique collectable for enthusiasts and a thoughtful gift for adults.

【Traditional Blacksmith Craft｜Engaging Build】 Forge, bellows, anvil and grindstone recreate the entire smithing process – heating, hammering, quenching and polishing. Enjoy a rewarding build that tells a story.

【Rich Interactive Details｜Explore & Discover】 Back-opening design reveals forge, repair and rest areas. Hidden details like a bookshelf with gold bars or changeable outfits add surprise and storytelling value.

【2-Year Warranty｜Build & Gift with Confidence】 All Lumibricks sets come with a 2-year warranty and free replacement parts. A worry-free choice for collectors, model builders and anyone looking for a unique gift.
